description: Weekly newsletter with curated Rust articles, crates, and community updates.

description: Experimental Rust compiler front-end for IDEs — essential tooling for Rust devs.

title: The Rustonomicon

title: Comprehensive Rust

title: Easy Rust
description: Rust explained in simple English with plenty of examples for beginners.

title: Programming Rust (2nd Edition)

title: Rust for Rustaceans
description: For developers who know the basics and want to write idiomatic, production Rust.

title: Let's Get Rusty
description: Popular YouTube channel with tutorials, project walkthroughs, and Rust news.
author: Let's Get Rusty

title: Jon Gjengset

author: Jon Gjengset

title: Exercism — Rust Track
